greeting.text: Hello! Welcome to Allbotix Robotics 👋 How may I help you today?

services.text: We now provide only Allbotix robotics solutions through this chatbot. Which robotics area are you interested in?

av_solutions.text: Our AV division covers end-to-end audio-visual needs. What would you like to explore?

cables.text:
🔌 *Cables & Connectivity*

Your one-stop guide to understanding the various cables essential for modern technology. Here, we break down the key types of cables used for data transfer, power, and connectivity. Whether you're setting up your home entertainment system, upgrading your computer hardware, or working on a technical project, knowing which cable to use is for optimal performance.

Select a cable category to learn more:

aoc_cable.text:
💡 *AOC Cable (Active Optical Cable)*

High-speed fibre-optic cables for long-distance HDMI and USB signal transmission without loss.

Select a product to learn more:

copper_cable.text:
🔌 *Copper Cable*

Reliable high-quality copper HDMI cables for standard short-run connections.

Select a product to learn more:

av_integration.text:
🔧 *AV Integration Services*

We design and deliver end-to-end audio-visual integration solutions tailored to your environment. Choose a solution to learn more:

video_wall.text:
🖥️ *Video Wall Solution*

Our video wall solutions are designed to create stunning visual displays for a variety of environments, including control rooms, retail spaces, and public venues. With our cutting-edge technology, you can deliver high-impact visuals that captivate and engage your audience.

auditorium.text:
🎭 *Auditorium Solution*

Enhance your auditorium with our high-quality audio-visual systems, designed to provide an immersive experience for every audience member. Our solutions include powerful projectors, large screens, and superior sound systems to ensure clear and impactful presentations.

hospital.text:
🏥 *Hospital Solution*

Improve operational efficiency and patient outcomes in operating theaters with our advanced audio-visual solutions. Our systems include medical-grade displays, surgical cameras, and integrated audio systems, ensuring that every detail is visible and audible.

meeting_room.text:
📅 *Meeting Room Solution*

Facilitate seamless and productive video conferencing with our comprehensive solutions. Our systems include high-quality cameras, microphones, and speakers, along with easy-to-use control systems, ensuring that your meetings are always clear and effective.

public_address.text:
📢 *Public Address System*

Ensure clear and effective communication across large spaces with our reliable public address systems. Ideal for schools, offices, and public venues, our systems include high-quality microphones, amplifiers, and speakers to deliver your message loud and clear.

led_signage.text:
💡 *Active LED & Signage Solution*

Make a lasting impact with our vibrant active LED displays and signage solutions. Perfect for advertising, information displays, and more, our solutions feature bright, dynamic visuals that capture attention and convey your message effectively.

it_network.text:
🌐 *IT Network Solutions*

Reliable structured cabling, networking, and IT infrastructure for offices and enterprises. What would you like to know?

ai_solutions.text: Our AI division delivers intelligent automation and vision systems. What interests you?
